name: Stick Infinite Kingdom
short_description: Master strategic gameplay as you build, train, and upgrade units to protect your base. With an immersive storyline, stunning visuals, and easy controls, it's an epic battle for survival!
detailed_description:
Embark on an epic adventure as King Nirvan assigns a crucial quest to Oggnor following his mind-blowing discovery. As Oggnor ventures forth, he encounters Tychun, Xathos, and Atlonus along the way. The tale unfurls with a tapestry of twists and turns, woven with intricate lore and rich narratives.

Each encounter brings new challenges, forging bonds of camaraderie and testing the resilience of our heroes against the relentless tide of adversity. Set against a backdrop of stunning landscapes and immersive environments, this epic saga promises an unparalleled adventure that shapes the destiny of the kingdom. Brace yourself for an unforgettable odyssey filled with heart-pounding action and deep-seated mysteries.


- Tactical Combat -

Every battle is a test of your strategic prowess. Build and command a diverse army of stick-figure warriors, each with unique skills and strengths. From the fast-paced strikes of swordsmen to the long-range power of archers and the defensive might of armored giants, your unit composition is the key to victory. Choose your units wisely, deploy them with precision, and lead them to defend your kingdom against relentless enemies.

- Lead Your Army -

Take direct control of powerful leader characters and switch between them to utilize their unique abilities in battle.

- Survival Leaderboards -

Compete with friends and survive the highest number of nights against hordes of zombies to claim a top spot on the leaderboard.

- Rich 3D Visuals -

Experience the action with great visuals, extraordinary 3D graphics. Outmaneuver your opponents, exploit their weaknesses, and manage resources while simultaneously executing precision strikes with your heroes.

supported_languages:
English*, French, German, Spanish - Spain, Arabic, Japanese, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Spanish - Latin America, Thai, Turkish, Filipino, Hindi
*languages with full audio support
